_v1.3_note: tech_debt key added in milestone v1.3 (2026-04-28). Points to a Notion DATABASE (not a page) where pipeline-managed technical debts are recorded automatically by orchestrator-maintenance when QA-Loop returns PARTIAL_SUCCESS. Each entry must contain: date, pipeline (parent issue ID), impact (current behavior), resolution criteria, estimate, affected files, debt URL referenced in PR body. Run /setup-notion after replacing placeholders.
